response.justification: Bogdan has solid full-stack fundamentals and meaningful experience with high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby, but the resume shows no evidence of the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platform engineering, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or growth-funnel instrumentation. The career trajectory is primarily web/backend product development and GIS tooling, with no data science partnership, statistical analysis, or rollout-risk management experience. At IC6/Principal level, cross-team experimentation leadership is a non-negotiable, and the resume does not demonstrate that scope.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/second, async I/O, low-latency architecture)
Broad polyglot background (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, DLang, Node.js) satisfying the language breadth requirement
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open source library authorship
concerns: Zero experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-automation experience anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis background — the role's core technical surface area is entirely absent
Current scope is Senior/Staff individual contributor on product features; no evidence of Principal-level cross-team influence, growth strategy ownership, or multi-workstream technical leadership

key_factors.factor: Missing telemetry and metrics infrastructure background
